subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana sees the recent chaos and death of the ruling elite as creating many opportunities for her guild.
source_quote: seeing the recent chaos and death of the ruling elite as creating many opportunities for her guild

subject: the party
fact: The party declines the political power offered by Isthana.
source_quote: offers them political power in Hillsfar, which they decline

subject: Charles
fact: Charles is known for his dramatic and somewhat over-the-top demeanor.
source_quote: known for his dramatic and somewhat over-the-top demeanor

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim recognizes Solom's Pendant as authentic.

subject: Daein

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim realizes that Pass Without Trace gives the owlbear a plus 11.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim notes that Greater Restoration is always good to have around for its powerful restorative properties.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim notes that Calm Emotions is the only thing that works on a creature referred to as 'sphere'.
